title: Cutting Assistent
productOverviewTitle: Precise Cutting Quality - Optimized with Data
productOverviewText:
In traditional manufacturing, laser-cutting quality is often based on experience:

Parameters are adjusted manually, evaluated, and iteratively improved. This process is time-consuming, operator-dependent, and prone to variation.

The TRUMPF Cutting Assistant transforms this approach.

By using artificial intelligence, cutting parameters are captured, evaluated, and optimized automatically - based on real quality data directly from the component.

Quality is no longer created by experience alone.

It becomes measurable and reproducible.
story1Title: Series Production: Stability as the Decisive Factor
story1Body1: In serial production, deviations are not isolated cases but a multiplier for costs.
story1Body2: Even a minimal change in cutting quality quickly becomes visible at high production volumes.
story1Body3: Material batches vary, components become more complex, and requirements increase.
story1EffectsHeading: The Cutting Assistant ensures continuous stabilization of the process:
story1Effect1: automatic adjustment of parameters to material fluctuations
story1Effect2: consistent quality across entire production runs
story1Effect3: reproducible results independent of operator changes
story1FinalHtml: The process is not only optimized - it becomes robust.

card2Kicker: Medium-sized Businesses: Know-how as a Bottleneck
card2Body1: In many companies, manufacturing know-how is concentrated in only a few people.
card2Body2: If this experience is missing, error rates and setup times increase.
card2EffectsHeading: The Cutting Assistant shifts this knowledge into the process itself:
card2Effect3: results are independent of the operator
card2Final: Experience remains relevant - but it is no longer the limiting factor.
card3Body1: In development, speed and iteration are the priority.
card3Body2: Manufacturing know-how is often not available.
card3Effect3: reproducible quality from the first component
card3Effect4: focus on product development instead of process optimization
